sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting the comma does not affect the meaning of the sentence in Chinese.
The substitution changes the meaning from 'several' (几) to 'immediate' or 'namely' (即), which makes the sentence confusing and alters the intended meaning.
The substitution of '说' (say) to '硕' (master/large) makes the sentence incoherent and changes the meaning significantly.
Omitting the period does not affect the meaning of the sentence.
